message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 12
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle plain
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 10
skinparam classMethodFontStyle plain
skinparam classMethodFontSize 10
skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle italic
skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 10
skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #666666
skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classStereotypeBorderThickness 1
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRadius 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPadding 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSpacing 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderGap 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOffset 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderShift 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSkew 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotate 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScale 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslate 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransform 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMatrix 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPerspective 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotate3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScale3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslate3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransform3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMatrix3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPerspective3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotateX 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotateY 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotateZ 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScaleX 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScaleY 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScaleZ 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslateX 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslateY 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslateZ 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformOrigin 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformStyle 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBox 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderBackfaceVisibility 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderClipPath 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMask 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderFilter 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderBackdropFilter 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMixBlendMode 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderIsolation 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOpacity 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOverflow 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOverflowX 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOverflowY 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollBehavior 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollSnapType 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollSnapAlign 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollSnapStop 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollPadding 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollBehavior 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollSnapType 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollSnapAlign 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollSnapStop 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScrollPadding 5

class "bool3x3" as bool3x3 {
    <<struct>>
    + bool3x3(c0:bool3, c1:bool3, c2:bool3)
    + bool3x3(m00:bool, m01:bool, m02:bool, m10:bool, m11:bool, m12:bool, m20:bool, m21:bool, m22:bool)
    + bool3x3(v:bool)
    + Equals(rhs:bool3x3) : bool
    + «override» Equals(o:object) : bool
    + «override» GetHashCode() : int
    + «override» ToString() : string
}

class "math" as math {
    <<static>>
    <<partial>>
    + bool3x3(c0:bool3, c1:bool3, c2:bool3) : bool3x3
    + bool3x3(m00:bool, m01:bool, m02:bool, m10:bool, m11:bool, m12:bool, m20:bool, m21:bool, m22:bool) : bool3x3
    + bool3x3(v:bool) : bool3x3
    + transpose(v:bool3x3) : bool3x3
    + hash(v:bool3x3) : uint
    + hashwide(v:bool3x3) : uint3
}

class "bool3" as bool3 {
    + c0
    + c1
    + c2
}

class "IEquatable`1" as IEquatable {
    + T
}

bool3x3 --|> IEquatable : <T>
bool3x3 -- bool3 : c0
bool3x3 -- bool3 : c1
bool3x3 -- bool3 : c2

@enduml
